Hero.migrations: Unified lead operations for your business.
Hero.integrated: One inbox for every digital channel, automatic CRM sync, and a custom AI chatbot for 24/7 instant response.
Hero.clientsIntro: Built by a team that has delivered enterprise solutions for:

WhyDifferent.title: Built for
WhyDifferent.paragraph1: Your leads come in through WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, and your website — but land in different apps, managed by different people with no shared visibility. Your CRM gets updated manually, so your pipeline is always outdated.
WhyDifferent.paragraph2: We build a system that connects all your channels into one shared inbox, syncs your leads to your CRM automatically, and shows you where each lead comes from and where it drops off — with a custom AI chatbot that responds in seconds, 24/7.
WhyDifferent.paragraph3: Your team manages everything from one place. Your pipeline is always up to date. No lead falls through the cracks.
WhyDifferent.zeroErrors: Your pipeline, always up to date

Features.title: What You
Features.subtitle: Everything your business needs to organize its leads and never lose one to poor visibility or slow response times

services.inbox: Unified inbox for WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, and web chat — all in one screen
services.organization: Assign conversations and tag leads — with full history per contact
services.crmSync: CRM integration — leads flow in automatically, no manual updates
services.analytics: Campaign and source analytics — know where each lead comes from and where it drops off
services.ai: Custom AI chatbot that responds in seconds, qualifies the lead, and hands it off to the right person — 24/7

discovery.title: Discovery Call
discovery.description: We learn about your business, the channels where your leads come in, your current CRM (if any), and how your team works today.

proposal.title: Setup & Configuration
proposal.description: We connect your WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, and web chat to your unified inbox, and sync it with your CRM. No technical work required on your end.

implementation.title: AI Training
implementation.description: We configure the AI with your business-specific information — services, FAQs, hours, and qualification flows.

training.title: Team Training
training.description: We train your team to manage the inbox. It's simple — if they can use WhatsApp, they can use this.

support.title: Ongoing Support
support.description: We stay with you. Monthly check-ins, AI optimization, and priority support whenever you need it.

q1.question: Which messaging channels do you support?
q1.answer: We support WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, Facebook Messenger, email, web chat (live chat widget on your website), and SMS. All messages arrive in a single inbox that your team manages from one screen.

q2.question: How does the AI work?
q2.answer: The AI responds automatically on first contact, asks qualifying questions, and hands the lead off to the right person on your team when it's ready. After hours, it keeps the conversation warm so the lead doesn't go cold.

q3.question: Do my clients know they're talking to AI?
q3.answer: The AI responds naturally and in context. Most clients won't notice the difference. Whenever a client asks for a human or the AI detects a complex situation, it immediately transfers the conversation to your team with full context.

q4.question: How long does it take to get set up?
q4.answer: Most businesses are fully live within 2 weeks. We handle all the technical configuration — connecting your channels, training the AI, and setting up your inbox. Your team only needs to attend 1-2 short training sessions.

q5.question: Can I see where my leads come from and what stage they're at?
q5.answer: Yes. The system connects to your existing CRM (or we set one up if you don't have one) and syncs every lead automatically. You get visibility into which channel or campaign generated each lead and where it sits in the pipeline — no manual updates needed.

q6.question: What happens if we already use WhatsApp Business on a phone?
q6.answer: We migrate your number to the WhatsApp Business API, which allows multiple agents to respond from the same number simultaneously through the inbox. Your clients keep messaging the same number — nothing changes for them.

FinalCTA.title: Ready to Organize Your Leads
FinalCTA.description: Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll show you how businesses like yours are unifying their channels, syncing their CRM automatically, and using AI to respond in seconds — without losing visibility on a single lead.

SpeedToLead.title: The First Responder
SpeedToLead.subtitle: Once your channels are organized and your pipeline is visible, response speed is what decides who wins the customer. 78% buy from the first business that responds.

fiveMin.title: The 5-Minute Rule
fiveMin.description: The odds of qualifying a lead drop 80% if you don't respond within the first 5 minutes.

firstResponder.title: First Response Wins
firstResponder.description: 78% of customers purchase from the business that responds first to their inquiry.

interestDrop.title: Interest Decay
interestDrop.description: The odds of closing a sale decrease 10 times after just 10 minutes of waiting.

travelerExpectation.title: Speed = Advantage
travelerExpectation.description: Companies that respond within 1 hour are 7x more likely to qualify the lead.

window.title: The Buying Window is Fleeting
window.description: When a potential client asks, they are in "buying mode." If you delay, they've already seen three more options. Kairos freezes that interest instantly.

ghosting.title: End Lead Ghosting
ghosting.description: Prevent messages from being left on read. By centralizing WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, and email, you eliminate human error entirely.

inventory.title: Every Unanswered Lead is Lost Revenue
inventory.description: A lead left unanswered today is a client who went to a competitor — forever. Speed to Lead is the most effective tool to convert more.

authority.title: Authority and Trust
authority.description: Responding in seconds projects professionalism and credibility. Clients interpret speed as a signal of service quality.

calculator.title: How Much Revenue Are You Losing?
calculator.description: Discover the real impact of not responding on time to your monthly leads.

Footer.description: Unified lead operations for SMBs. One inbox for every digital channel, CRM sync, and a 24/7 AI chatbot.
